name: Dapi MENA Open Banking and Financial Data API
what_it_does: Dapi MENA open banking and financial data REST API for Middle East and North Africa fintech developers, lenders, and financial services companies to connect to 100+ MENA bank accounts across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Kuwait, Jordan, Lebanon, and other Arab countries — enabling real-time account data access, payment initiation, identity verification, and income analysis through a single API covering the region's fragmented banking infrastructure. Enables AI agents to manage account connection for MENA bank access automation, handle transaction data for cash flow analysis automation, access balance verification for real-time account status automation, retrieve identity data for MENA KYC verification automation, manage payment initiation for bank transfer automation, handle income analysis for MENA lending underwriting automation, access account statement for financial history automation, retrieve sub-accounts for Islamic banking account structure automation, manage debit for direct account charge automation, and integrate Dapi with MENA lending, savings, and insurance platforms for financial services automation.
use_cases: Connecting to UAE and Saudi Arabian bank accounts for financial data aggregation automation agents
Verifying MENA bank account ownership and income for lending and credit scoring automation agents
Initiating bank-to-bank payments from MENA bank accounts for fintech checkout automation agents
Accessing transaction history and Islamic banking account data for MENA financial analytics automation agents
not_for: Non-MENA markets (Dapi specializes in MENA banking infrastructure, not European or American markets)
Cryptocurrency and digital asset transactions (Dapi is traditional MENA bank connectivity)
Real-time global payment rails (Dapi is MENA domestic banking connectivity)
best_when: A MENA fintech developer, lender, or financial services platform wanting AI agents to connect to bank accounts across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, and other Arab markets for account data aggregation, identity verification, and payment initiation through a single MENA open banking API.
avoid_when: MENA BANK COVERAGE VARIES SIGNIFICANTLY: Dapi bank coverage varies by country; automated uniform MENA coverage assumption creates unsupported_institution for specific banks; automated must verify coverage for target country and institution. USER WIDGET REQUIRED FOR BANK AUTH: Dapi bank connection requires user to authenticate through Dapi Connect widget (secure credential entry); automated server-side credential handling creates security violation; automated must integrate Dapi Connect SDK for user-facing bank auth. ISLAMIC BANKING ACCOUNT STRUCTURES: MENA banks often have Islamic banking sub-accounts (current, savings, murabaha) with different data structures; automated conventional banking model assumption creates Islamic account structure mismatch; automated must handle Islamic banking account types including sub-account structure. REGULATORY FRAMEWORKS VARY BY COUNTRY: MENA countries have different open banking regulations (UAE CBUAE, Saudi SAMA, Central Bank of Egypt); automated uniform regulatory assumption creates country-specific compliance gaps; automated must implement country-specific consent and data handling.

auth.notes: Dapi uses API key for authentication with Dapi Connect widget for user bank auth. REST API with JSON. Dubai, UAE and San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2019 by Shadi Eljurdi and Muhammed Elkhateeb. Products: Bank auth, account data, transactions, identity, balance, income verification, payment initiation, bank statements. SDKs: JavaScript, Python, Swift, Kotlin. 100+ MENA banks across 8+ countries. Raised $15M (Series A 2022). YC-backed (W20). CBUAE, SAMA data guidelines. Competes with Lean Technologies for MENA open banking.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox with test accounts; production billed per API call
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-API-call pricing; volume discounts; enterprise plans
pricing.notes: Dubai/SF. YC W20. Per-call pricing. MENA 8+ countries. CBUAE, SAMA compliant.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; bank data fetch APIs throttled; webhooks for async data events

known_agent_gotchas: DAPI CONNECT WIDGET MANDATORY: All bank authentication requires Dapi Connect widget; automated server-side bank credential handling creates security violation; automated must integrate Dapi Connect SDK for all user bank authentication flows

MENA BANK COVERAGE IS FRAGMENTED: Bank coverage varies significantly across MENA countries; automated uniform coverage assumption creates institution_not_supported; automated must use Dapi's institution list API to check coverage before attempting connection

ISLAMIC BANKING SUB-ACCOUNTS: Many MENA banks use Islamic banking structures with multiple sub-accounts under one account; automated single-account model creates incomplete balance picture; automated must handle sub-account structures and aggregate appropriately

ASYNC BANK DATA DELIVERY: Bank data fetches are asynchronous; automated synchronous response assumption creates empty or processing status; automated must implement Dapi webhooks for data ready notifications

SAUDI SAMA REGULATIONS FOR SAUDI BANKS: Saudi bank data access has SAMA (Saudi Arabian Monetary Authority) specific requirements; automated pan-MENA uniform handling creates SAMA compliance gaps; automated must implement SAMA-specific consent and data residency for Saudi bank connections
agent_readiness.security_notes: MENA open banking. CBUAE, SAMA, CBE, PDPL. API key + widget. UAE/SA/EG. Bank account and financial identity data.

security_score_components.security_notes: MENA open banking. CBUAE, SAMA, PDPL. API key + widget. UAE/SA. Bank account and financial data.
